title: Successful login redirects to Dashboard
description: Verifies a user can log in with valid credentials and is redirected to the dashboard.

title: Invalid password shows error and stays on Login
description: Verifies an incorrect password displays an invalid-credentials error and does not navigate away from the login page.

title: Login with non-existent user shows error and stays on Login
description: Verifies logging in with a non-existent email shows an error message and keeps the user on the login page.

title: Required field validation: empty email prevents login
description: Verifies the login form blocks submission and shows a visible validation message when email is missing.

title: Required field validation: empty password prevents login
description: Verifies the login form blocks submission and shows a visible validation message when password is missing.

title: Session persistence after refresh keeps user on Dashboard
description: Verifies the authenticated session persists so a refreshed page remains on the dashboard.

title: Login button disabled/loading prevents duplicate submissions
description: Verifies that after clicking Entrar, the UI indicates progress and prevents immediate repeated submissions.

title: Dashboard loads and shows KPI cards plus conversion chart
description: Verifies the dashboard renders KPI cards and the conversion chart for the default date range after login.

title: Refresh dashboard data and confirm KPIs still render after reload
description: Verifies the refresh control reloads dashboard data and KPI cards remain visible after the refresh.

steps.description: Verify element "Recent leads list" is visible

title: Pick a custom date range and verify chart updates for the selected period
description: Verifies selecting a custom date range via the day picker updates the chart area on the dashboard.

steps.description: Click to open the custom date range day picker
Select a start date on the day picker
Select an end date on the day picker

title: From dashboard, navigate to leads page via "Ver todos"
description: Verifies the "Ver todos" link/button on dashboard navigates to the /leads page.

title: Open notifications from bell icon on dashboard
description: Verifies the notifications modal/panel opens from the dashboard header bell icon.

steps.description: Click the bell icon in the header

title: Automatic Assistant: search, paginate, and open WhatsApp chat from a lead row
description: Verifies that a user can search leads in the Automatic Assistant tab, navigate pagination, and open a WhatsApp chat from a lead row.

steps.description: Click on "Leads" in the main navigation
Type "a" into the leads search field
Verify the leads table is visible
Verify the leads table is visible
Click the WhatsApp icon on the first visible lead row

title: Premium Assistant: sort by time in group
description: Verifies that premium leads can be sorted by time in group in the Premium Assistant tab.

steps.description: Click on "Leads" in the main navigation
Verify the leads table is visible
Click the "Time in group" sort control
Verify the leads table is visible

title: Premium Assistant: change premium status via inline dropdown and see it update in the list
description: Verifies that changing a lead's premium status using the inline dropdown updates the visible status in the table.

steps.description: Click on "Leads" in the main navigation
Verify the leads table is visible
Select a different option from the premium status dropdown on the first visible lead row

title: Automatic Assistant: status filter narrows the table results
description: Verifies that selecting a lead status from the filter dropdown updates the table to show filtered results.

steps.description: Click on "Leads" in the main navigation
Select a status option from the status filter dropdown
Verify the leads table is visible

title: Leads: search with no matches shows a "No leads found" empty state
description: Verifies that an empty state message appears when the search query returns no results.

steps.description: Click on "Leads" in the main navigation
Type "no-such-lead-000xyz" into the leads search field
Verify text "No leads found" is visible

title: Open Sales Funnel and verify leads appear in status columns with counts
description: Verifies the funnel page renders Kanban-style status columns with visible lead cards and a visible count per column.

title: Verify each funnel column shows a visible lead count
description: Verifies that each visible status column includes a visible numeric count indicator for leads in that column.

title: Open a lead card to view lead detail modal
description: Verifies clicking a lead card opens a lead detail modal with lead information visible.

steps.description: Click on the first visible lead card

title: Verify lead detail modal content is visible after opening a lead card
description: Verifies the lead detail modal appears and shows key lead detail fields as visible text or sections.

steps.description: Click on the first visible lead card
Verify element "Lead detail modal" is visible

title: Refresh funnel data and verify the funnel remains visible after refresh completes
description: Verifies the refresh action completes and the funnel columns remain visible after data reload.

steps.description: Click on the "Refresh" control on the funnel page

title: Refresh funnel data and verify counts are visible after refresh
description: Verifies that after triggering refresh, the per-column lead count indicators are still visible.

steps.description: Click on the "Refresh" control on the funnel page

title: Envios main page shows 'Em Desenvolvimento' placeholder overlay
description: Verifies the Envios landing page displays the under-development placeholder and no active send experience is presented.

title: Navigate from Envios to Histórico and see history list
description: Verifies the user can reach the History sub-page from Envios and sees the message history screen content.

title: Navigate from Envios to Templates and see templates list
description: Verifies the user can reach the Templates sub-page from Envios and sees the templates list screen content.

title: Start template creation from Templates page using '+' action
description: Verifies the create-new-template entry point is available and opens a creation UI (form or modal).

title: Envios main page prevents access to sending controls (under development messaging)
description: Verifies that attempting to use sending-related actions on Envios shows the under-development state and does not expose a sending workflow.

title: Envios sub-navigation is visible and offers Histórico and Templates links
description: Verifies the Envios section provides sub-navigation options to reach functional pages (History and Templates).

title: Switch between Histórico and Templates via sub-navigation without direct URL navigation
description: Verifies in-section navigation works by clicking and updates visible page state accordingly.

title: Filter message history by date range and type and open details
description: Verifies the user can filter the history list and view full send information in the detail modal.

steps.description: Click on "Envios" in the main navigation
Click on "Histórico" in the Envios navigation
Select a date range in the date range filter
Select an option in the "Type" filter dropdown
Click on the first item in the history list
Verify element "Send details modal" is visible

title: Refresh history list from the history page
description: Verifies the refresh action reloads the history list and remains on the history page.

steps.description: Click on "Envios" in the main navigation
Click on "Histórico" in the Envios navigation

title: Open an item and view full information in the details modal
description: Verifies that selecting a history item opens a modal with complete send information.

steps.description: Click on "Envios" in the main navigation
Click on "Histórico" in the Envios navigation
Click on the first item in the history list
Verify element "Send details modal" is visible

title: Close the details modal and return to the history list
description: Verifies the details modal can be dismissed and the user remains on the history page.

steps.description: Click on "Envios" in the main navigation
Click on "Histórico" in the Envios navigation
Click on the first item in the history list
Verify element "Send details modal" is visible
Click the "Close" button in the modal
Verify element "Send details modal" is not visible

title: Filtering to a range/type with no results shows an empty state
description: Verifies the UI handles no matching history results after applying filters.

steps.description: Click on "Envios" in the main navigation
Click on "Histórico" in the Envios navigation
Select a date range far in the past in the date range filter
Select an option in the "Type" filter dropdown

title: Refresh while filters are applied keeps user in context and shows list
description: Verifies refreshing history after applying filters keeps the user on the history page and shows results or an empty state.

steps.description: Click on "Envios" in the main navigation
Click on "Histórico" in the Envios navigation
Select a date range in the date range filter
Select an option in the "Type" filter dropdown

title: Create a new message template and verify it appears in the list
description: Validates that a user can create a template via the modal form and then see it listed on the Templates page.

steps.description: Click on the "Templates" option in the "Envios" (Sends) section of the navigation
Click the "+" button to create a new template
Type "Template E2E - Promo 01" into the template name field
Select "Promoção" from the template type dropdown
Type "Olá! Esta é uma mensagem de teste." into the first message field
Verify text "Template E2E - Promo 01" is visible

title: Cancel template creation and verify nothing is added
description: Ensures closing the create modal without saving does not add a new template to the list.

steps.description: Click on the "Templates" option in the "Envios" (Sends) section of the navigation
Click the "+" button to create a new template
Type "Template E2E - Cancel" into the template name field
Verify text "Novo Template" is not visible

title: Attempt to create a template with invalid data and verify validation blocks saving
description: Validates client-side validation errors are shown and the template is not created when required fields are invalid.

steps.description: Click on the "Templates" option in the "Envios" (Sends) section of the navigation
Click the "+" button to create a new template

title: Verify Templates page loads and shows an empty-state or list state
description: Confirms the Templates page loads successfully and displays either existing template cards or an empty-state message.

steps.description: Click on the "Templates" option in the "Envios" (Sends) section of the navigation

title: Save updated message content in Etapas do Funil tab
description: Verifies a user can edit a funnel step message and save it successfully in the Etapas do Funil tab.

steps.description: Verify text "Etapas do Funil" is visible
Type "Mensagem de teste atualizada" into a funnel step message content field
Verify text "Salvo" or "Salvo com sucesso" is visible

title: Switch between Etapas do Funil and Follow-ups tabs
description: Verifies the user can switch tabs and see the correct tab content rendered.

steps.description: Verify text "Etapas do Funil" is visible

title: Save follow-up timing configuration successfully
description: Verifies a user can configure timing for a follow-up and save the configuration.

steps.description: Select "1" from the follow-up timing value dropdown
Select "Dia(s)" (Days) from the follow-up timing unit dropdown
Verify text "Salvo" or "Salvo com sucesso" is visible

title: Edit follow-up message content and save
description: Verifies the user can edit follow-up message content (not only timing) and save changes.

steps.description: Type "Follow-up: mensagem de teste" into a follow-up message content field
Verify text "Salvo" or "Salvo com sucesso" is visible

title: Validate required message content prevents saving empty message
description: Verifies the UI prevents saving when message content is empty and shows a validation message.

steps.description: Type "" into a funnel step message content field
Verify text "Campo obrigatório" or "Mensagem é obrigatória" is visible

title: Large message content can be saved successfully
description: Verifies the user can save a long message without UI truncation errors and sees a success confirmation.

steps.description: Type "Mensagem longa de teste: Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. Sed do eiusmod tempor incididunt ut labore et dolore magna aliqua." into a funnel step message content field
Verify text "Salvo" or "Salvo com sucesso" is visible

title: Follow-up timing unit change persists after save
description: Verifies changing the follow-up timing unit and saving shows the selected unit on the page after save confirmation.

steps.description: Select "2" from the follow-up timing value dropdown
Select "Hora(s)" (Hours) from the follow-up timing unit dropdown
Verify text "Salvo" or "Salvo com sucesso" is visible

title: Add a new WhatsApp number and verify it appears in the list
description: Verifies a user can add a new WhatsApp number via the modal and see it listed.

steps.description: Click on "Números" in the main navigation
Click on the "Adicionar" button to add a new number
Type "Numero Teste 01" into the name/label field
Type "+5511999999999" into the WhatsApp number/phone field

title: Toggle a WhatsApp number active/inactive and verify status changes
description: Verifies toggling a number updates its visible active/inactive status in the list.

steps.description: Click on "Números" in the main navigation
Click the active/inactive toggle for the first number in the list
Verify the first number card shows a visible status change (e.g., "Ativo" or "Inativo")

title: Delete a WhatsApp number with confirmation and verify it is removed
description: Verifies the delete confirmation modal works and the number disappears from the list after confirming.

steps.description: Click on "Números" in the main navigation
Click on the "Excluir" (delete) button for the first number in the list
Click on the "Confirmar" button in the confirmation modal
Verify text "Confirmar exclusão" is not visible

title: Cancel deletion from confirmation modal and verify number remains
description: Verifies canceling the delete confirmation keeps the number in the list.

steps.description: Click on "Números" in the main navigation
Click on the first WhatsApp number card to note its displayed name
Verify the first WhatsApp number name is visible on the card
Click on the "Excluir" (delete) button for that same number card
Click on the "Cancelar" button in the confirmation modal
Verify text "Confirmar exclusão" is not visible
Verify the previously noted WhatsApp number name is still visible in the list

title: Edit an existing WhatsApp number and verify updated details appear
description: Verifies a user can edit a number via the edit modal and see updated values on the card.

steps.description: Click on "Números" in the main navigation
Click on the "Editar" button for the first number in the list
Type "Numero Editado" into the name/label field

title: Add an opening message and verify it is visible under Mensagens de Abertura
description: Verifies a user can add an opening message and see it displayed in the opening messages list.

steps.description: Click on "Números" in the main navigation
Click on the "Mensagens de Abertura" tab
Click on the "Adicionar" button to add a new opening message
Type "Olá! Obrigado pelo contato. Como posso ajudar?" into the message text field
Verify text "Olá! Obrigado pelo contato. Como posso ajudar?" is visible

title: Edit an opening message and verify the updated content is shown
description: Verifies a user can edit an existing opening message and see updated text displayed.

steps.description: Click on "Números" in the main navigation
Click on the "Mensagens de Abertura" tab
Click on the "Editar" button for the first opening message in the list
Type "Mensagem atualizada: podemos conversar agora?" into the message text field
Verify text "Mensagem atualizada: podemos conversar agora?" is visible

title: Attempt to add a WhatsApp number with invalid phone format and verify validation error
description: Verifies invalid phone format is blocked with a visible validation message and no save occurs.

steps.description: Click on "Números" in the main navigation
Click on the "Adicionar" button to add a new number
Type "Numero Invalido" into the name/label field
Type "123-ABC" into the WhatsApp number/phone field

title: View notifications list with type icons and relative timestamps
description: Verifies the notifications page loads and displays notifications with visible type indicators and relative timestamps.

steps.description: Click "Notificações" in the main navigation menu
Verify element "Notification item with type icon and relative timestamp" is visible

title: Mark a single notification as read by opening it
description: Verifies clicking a notification marks it as read and the UI reflects the read state.

steps.description: Click "Notificações" in the main navigation menu
Verify element "Unread notification item" is visible
Verify element "Selected notification marked as read" is visible

title: Mark all notifications as read using 'Mark all as read'
description: Verifies the 'Mark all as read' control marks every notification as read and clears the unread indicator.

steps.description: Click "Notificações" in the main navigation menu
Verify element "Mark all as read" is visible
Verify element "Unread count indicator" is not visible
Verify element "Any unread notification indicator" is not visible

title: Notifications page empty state
description: Verifies the page shows a clear empty state when there are no notifications to display.

steps.description: Click "Notificações" in the main navigation menu
Verify element "Notifications list" is not visible

title: Mark all as read is idempotent when everything is already read
description: Verifies clicking 'Mark all as read' does not break the UI when there are no unread notifications.

steps.description: Click "Notificações" in the main navigation menu
Verify element "Unread count indicator" is not visible
Verify element "Unread count indicator" is not visible

title: Notification type variety is visually distinguishable
description: Verifies that different notification types (new lead, interest, conversion, group exit) are visually distinguishable via labels or icons.

steps.description: Click "Notificações" in the main navigation menu
Verify element "Notification item for new lead" is visible
Verify element "Notification item for interest signal" is visible
Verify element "Notification item for conversion" is visible
Verify element "Notification item for group exit" is visible

title: Update display name and verify it is reflected on the settings page
description: Ensures a user can change their display name, save it, and see the updated name reflected in the UI.

steps.description: Click on "Configurações" in the app navigation/menu
Type "QA User Updated" into the display name field
Verify text "QA User Updated" is visible

title: Toggle notification preferences (new leads + conversions) and save
description: Ensures notification toggles can be changed and saved with visible confirmation of the new state.

steps.description: Click on "Configurações" in the app navigation/menu
Click the toggle for "Notificações de novos leads" (new leads notifications)
Click the toggle for "Notificações de conversões" (conversions notifications)

title: Persist notification preferences after reload of settings page
description: Ensures saved notification preferences remain set after leaving and returning to the settings screen.

steps.description: Click on "Configurações" in the app navigation/menu
Click the toggle for "Notificações de novos leads" (new leads notifications)
Click on "Dashboard" in the app navigation/menu
Click on "Configurações" in the app navigation/menu
Verify element "Notificações de novos leads" toggle is visible

title: Change password with correct current password and verify success confirmation
description: Ensures a user can change their password by providing the current password and a new password and receives a success message.

steps.description: Click on "Configurações" in the app navigation/menu
Type "{{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}" into the current password field
Type "NewPass!2345" into the new password field

title: Attempt password change with incorrect current password and verify error message
description: Ensures the app blocks password change when current password is wrong and shows a visible error.

steps.description: Click on "Configurações" in the app navigation/menu
Type "WrongCurrentPass!" into the current password field
Type "NewPass!2345" into the new password field
Verify text "Senha atual incorreta" is visible

title: Save display name with empty value and verify validation message
description: Ensures the settings page prevents saving an empty display name and shows a visible validation error.

steps.description: Click on "Configurações" in the app navigation/menu
Type "" into the display name field
Verify text "Nome é obrigatório" is visible

title: Attempt password change with new password empty and verify validation message
description: Ensures the app prevents changing password when new password is missing and shows a visible validation error.

steps.description: Click on "Configurações" in the app navigation/menu
Type "{{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}" into the current password field
Type "" into the new password field
Verify text "Nova senha é obrigatória" is visible

title: Verify settings page shows all main sections (profile, notifications, password)
description: Ensures the settings UI renders the expected sections so users can manage profile, notification preferences, and password.

steps.description: Click on "Configurações" in the app navigation/menu
